_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of developing user-centered conceptual and logical designs.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of innovation program design, including ideation methods, prototype development approaches, value hypothesis construction, and stage-gate evaluation criteria.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-004 (OP, cosine: 0.498), DA-K-002 (DA, cosine: 0.480).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.581). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [centered, conceptual, designs, developing, logical, user] vs WIDAI-only terms [approaches, construction, criteria, design, development, evaluation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.904, R=0.865). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.8%). "Knowledge of developing user-centered conceptual and logical designs." and "Knowledge of innovation program design, including ideation methods, prototype de" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.536 ≈ STS 0.581 (gap 0.045). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [centered, conceptual, designs, developing, logical, user]. WIDAI-only: [approaches, construction, criteria, design, development, evaluation].
